---
title: "catalog_check.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\tools\debug\catalog_check.py"
loc: 30
complexity: 2
logic_score: 9.13
style_score: 3.95
intel_score: 1.40
overall_score: 3.83
---

## Intent
The `catalog_check.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on internal logic. It forms a node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via internal logic. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 9.1/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.9/10
- **Intel [I]**: 1.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 6 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [sys](file://sys)
- [engine.vector](file://engine.vector)

### Exports
Internal logic only.
